ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 4 AU, S, M) */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Dresses) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, in) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "shoulder_to_waist" REAL /* Shoulder to waist measurement */,
  "waist_to_hip" REAL /* Waist to hip measurement */,
  "thigh_circumference" REAL /* Thigh circumference measurement */,
  "knee_circumference" REAL /* Knee circumference measurement */,
  "ankle_circumference" REAL /* Ankle circumference measurement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the size was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_factors" (
  "conversion_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion factor */,
  "unit_from" TEXT /* Unit from which the conversion is made */,
  "unit_to" TEXT /* Unit to which the conversion is made */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the conversion factor was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the conversion factor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the brand was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the color was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the color was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the material was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the material was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_size_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "shoulder_to_waist" REAL /* Shoulder to waist measurement */,
  "waist_to_hip" REAL /* Waist to hip measurement */,
  "thigh_circumference" REAL /* Thigh circumference measurement */,
  "knee_circumference" REAL /* Knee circumference measurement */,
  "ankle_circumference" REAL /* Ankle circumference measurement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the size preference was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the size preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_size_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_size_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES order_history ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was made */,
  "replacement_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replacement product (if any) */,
  "replacement_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replacement size (if any) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the return was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the return was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_replacement_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("replacement_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_replacement_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("replacement_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
